title: polypodium × shivasiae
intro: Polypodium × shivasiae, also known as Shiv's Polypody, is a hybrid species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Polypodium × shivasiae include its potential to reduce fever, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy. In terms of herbal preparations, Polypodium × shivasiae is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal supplements and traditional medicine.
